name: Successful Account Login Via WMI
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thomas Patzke
SIGMA Title: Successful Account Login Via WMI
SIGMA Description: Detects successful logon attempts performed with WMI

False positives:
- Monitoring tools
- Legitimate system administration

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\wmiprvse.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Successful Account Login Via WMI on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND LOWER("Process Name") LIKE '%\wmiprvse.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Successful Account Login Via WMI

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.
